description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a detached double garage and a fenced yard. The front yard features a pathway, small garden beds, and a main entry with steps leading to a central door. The backyard includes a swimming pool, patio furniture, and landscaped greenery, all enclosed by a wooden fence. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the main facade, with white frames contrasting the red brick exterior. The roof is primarily gabled, with the garage featuring a matching gable roof. The property is designed in a suburban style, offering both functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A two-story red brick house with a gabled roof, detached double garage, fenced yard, and a backyard pool. Symmetrical windows and landscaped gardens enhance its suburban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, front garden, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and fenced garden space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the brick facade, garage, and extended backyard with pool and lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear garden, side windows, and part of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, small porch, and flanking garden beds
